entry.title: Lissy93 commented on an issue in web-check
entry.content:
Lissy93 commented on Lissy93/web-check#291 · May 9, 2026 02:12
Lissy93 commented May 9, 2026
It has been painful 😂 It is all working now, but... I don't like it! Monorepo should be a much cleaner structure. But web-check has an annoying con…
